title: bidirectional typing in the formula window
excerpt: In the formula window editing a formula that has Hebrew characters (as either column name or text) cannot be edited. The Hebrew characters change their location within the sentence automatically and the whole text become…

posts.author: alexco (Alex)
posts.cookedHtml:
In the formula window editing a formula that has Hebrew characters (as either column name or text) cannot be edited. The Hebrew characters change their location within the sentence automatically and the whole text becomes messy. Windows built-in functions do not seems to work here.
It would be great if you can add a left-right or right-left selector as you have in the ‘update’ editor for each item.
